title: [PM] Complete Sanjeeva Aushadh Master Strategy & Pitches
body:
### Objective
Document the clinical problem space and pitch the comprehensive product trilogy (Vision -> Discovery via Divya Drishti -> Gatekeeping via Lakshman Rekha -> Restoration via Sanjeevani).

### Role Hat
Outbound Product Manager / Founder

### Expected Deliverables
- Create `documentation/01_ideation/product_trilogy_vision.md`
- Build high-impact elevator and Y-Combinator style text pitches focusing on the $25B allergy crisis.

title: [TPM] Complete PRD for Module 1: Divya Drishti Descriptive Engine
body:
### Objective
Define exact data boundary specifications for calculating the global baseline prevalence of allergens in oral medications using openFDA datasets.

### Role Hat
Technical Product Manager (TPM)

### Expected Deliverables
- Finalize `documentation/02_product_spec/PRD_phase1_divya_drishti.md`
- Define core metric frameworks (Percentages, Modes, Frequency Distributions).

title: [DataScientist] Build Divya Drishti Synthetic Data Generator
body:
### Objective
Write a reproducible Python script generating structured patient allergies and text-heavy medication ingredient lists (like Synthroid, Levoxyl) to safely benchmark string-parsing pipelines.

### Role Hat
Data Scientist / Simulated Data Creator

### Expected Deliverables
- Create `src/data_generation/synthetic_meds_generator.py`
- Ensure programmatic distribution of allergy aliases (e.g., Lactose monohydrate, Caseinate, Whey).

title: [AI-Engineer] Design System Architecture Diagram for Phase 1 & 2
body:
### Objective
Map out the structural technical architecture showing data ingestion layers, text cleaning text tokens, rule match filters, and warning intercept screens.

### Role Hat
AI Solutions Engineer / Architect

### Expected Deliverables
- Create `documentation/03_architecture/system_design_v1_descriptive.md` integrating a complete Mermaid.js system flowchart.

title: [Developer] Implement Phase 1: Divya Drishti Analytical Metrics Engine
body:
### Objective
Write production-grade Python scripts that intake the simulated dataset, normalize ingredient text variations (lowercasing, punctuation removal), and extract precise target statistical metrics (Percentages and Modes).

### Role Hat
Software / ML Engineer

### Expected Deliverables
- Code data engineering files inside the `src/phase1_divya_drishti/descriptive_indicators.py` directory.

title: [QA-Tester] Build PyTest Validation Harness for Baseline Indicators
body:
### Objective
Write automated unit test assertions ensuring that fractional string logic does not miss sub-string allergy elements or output distorted statistical math.

### Role Hat
QA Automation Tester

### Expected Deliverables
- Create `tests/test_divya_engine.py` using standard pytest assertions.

title: [TPM] Complete PRD for Module 2: Lakshman Rekha Safety Gatekeeper
body:
### Objective
Scope out the active real-time clinical interception logic. Define what triggers a hard 'UNSAFE' block when an input drug contains an excipient matched to a patient's active allergy profile.

### Role Hat
Technical PM

### Expected Deliverables
- Complete `documentation/02_product_spec/PRD_phase2_lakshman_rekha.md` with explicit error handling and pharmacist override logic boundaries.

title: [Developer] Implement Phase 2: Lakshman Rekha Intercept Core Rules Engine
body:
### Objective
Develop the core boolean conditional tracking logic that serves as the clinical decision support safety firewall.

### Role Hat
AI Engineer / Developer

### Expected Deliverables
- Write code assets inside `src/phase2_lakshman_rekha/clinical_decision_rules.py` mapping input allergy profiles directly against target drug JSON arrays.

title: [QA-Tester] Design Multi-Allergen Boundary Intercept Security Tests
body:
### Objective
Validate that the safety wall cannot be bypassed by hidden alias permutations (e.g., checking if a user allergic to dairy is successfully blocked when a drug contains 'Lactoferrin').

### Role Hat
QA Automation Tester

### Expected Deliverables
- Code integration unit asserts inside `tests/test_safety_rules.py`.

title: [TPM/PM] Complete PRD for Module 3: Sanjeevani Recommendation Engine
body:
### Objective
Scope the algorithmic recommendation system. Define how the application safely processes alternative formulations, maps therapeutic equivalents, and ensures substitution options are 100% allergen-free.

### Role Hat
Technical Product Manager

### Expected Deliverables
- Finalize `documentation/02_product_spec/PRD_phase3_sanjeevani.md` detailing the product substitution workflow layers.

title: [AI-Architect] Design Phase 3 Sanjeevani Advanced Graph & Substitution Routing Architecture
body:
### Objective
Design the technical architecture framework for cross-mapping equivalent medications and filtering them through an automated excipient safety layer.

### Role Hat
AI Solutions Engineer / Architect

### Expected Deliverables
- Draft advanced architecture spec `documentation/03_architecture/system_design_v2_predictive.md` mapping dynamic data lookup layers.

title: [Developer] Implement Phase 3: Sanjeevani Alternative Router Engine & Interactive Streamlit UI
body:
### Objective
Develop the core recommendation engine algorithm. Package the trilogy into an interactive front-end mockup showcasing the entire live lifecycle flow.

### Role Hat
AI Engineer / Full-Stack Developer

### Expected Deliverables
- Create functional application code inside `src/phase3_sanjeevani/alternative_router.py`.
- Provide a working local visual UI setup snippet for portfolio review sessions.
